summary: Round 1 addressed 32 CRITICAL findings across 4 domains (security, dx, performance, quality). 23 CRITICALs were fixed, 9 were deferred with valid justifications (sandbox isolation needs architectural work, API key encryption needs OS keychain, test file creation was out of scope, TaskList virtualization needs new dependency). All 2469 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint has 0 errors (73 pre-existing warnings). Key wins: CORS locked to localhost origins, test-reset guarded behind NODE_ENV/E2E_MODE, security headers added, tar extraction zip-slip protection, settings API allowlisted, 15+ `as any` casts eliminated, React context values memoized, 11 views lazy-loaded, useAppState task filtering consolidated from 4 passes to 1, silent .catch(() => {}) replaced with logging in 15 instances. One minor discrepancy: DX fix report claims server.ts console.log was removed but it is still present on line 122.

deferred_criticals.justification: Local-first app, CORS now restricted to localhost origins, mitigates primary attack vector

deferred_criticals.issue: Plugin sandbox is a no-op stub
deferred_criticals.justification: Architectural change, community plugins require explicit user opt-in

deferred_criticals.issue: API keys stored as plaintext in SQLite
deferred_criticals.justification: Needs OS keychain integration (keytar), local-only database, requires dedicated sprint
Requires @tanstack/react-virtual dependency and significant component refactoring

deferred_criticals.issue: TaskService, ProjectService, EventBus, queries.ts lack dedicated test files
deferred_criticals.justification: Test file creation was out of scope for fix agents; should be prioritized in future rounds

focus_next_round: Test coverage gaps: create test files for core/tasks.ts, core/projects.ts, core/event-bus.ts, db/queries.ts
Context splitting: separate TaskContext into state/dispatch contexts to reduce re-renders
Remove remaining `as any` casts (browser-stt.ts, piper-local-tts.ts, builtin-views.ts) via .d.ts declarations
Add Zod validation to API request bodies across route files
Fix server.ts residual console.log on line 122 (reported as fixed but still present)
Add pagination to Completed and Cancelled views
Extract shared task extraction regex constants (ExtractTasksModal + extract-tasks-from-text.ts)
